codeReview.summary: Reviewed the current branch state, commit `b9e64b69fc84234465e7554a7be690fa78c13b05`, the worker transcript skeleton, and the scoped `XeokitMeasurementPanel` diff for this rerun. The feature commit is narrowly scoped to a new regression test file, and those tests exercise real public selectors/behaviors already present in `src/components/tools/XeokitMeasurementPanel.vue`: row selection updates `activeXeokitMeasurementId`, annotation selection is mirrored through `selectAnnotation`, clear-all empties both xeokit measurement collections, and pointer-lens fallback text is rendered through the hover hint surface. I did not find blocking or non-blocking issues in the reviewed change set.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The designer-tracking-worker skill still treats agent-browser manual verification as a default required step, but this rerun baseline repair was test-only and was reasonably verified through automated regression coverage plus project validators.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/Volumes/DPC/work/plant-code/plant3d-web/.factory/skills/designer-tracking-worker/SKILL.md` step 6 requires agent-browser manual verification, while transcript skeleton entry for worker session `11306958-7df1-42c5-ba53-188447b90bbb` records a justified deviation because the feature only restored dimensions/generation/measurement baselines and had no meaningful browser flow to verify.

summary: Pass. On the current branch, this rerun feature remains a focused test-only baseline repair: commit `b9e64b6` adds `src/components/tools/XeokitMeasurementPanel.test.ts`, and the assertions align with the component's existing selectors and xeokit measurement behavior without introducing runtime regressions.
